---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability (activity type, tool, etc.)
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What would you like to add?**
e.g. "A `create_assignment` function" or "a tool to grade a submission."

**Why is it useful?**
The problem it solves or the workflow it enables.

**Which part?**
- [ ] New Moodle plugin function
- [ ] New MCP tool
- [ ] Other

**Additional context**
Links to the relevant Moodle API / web service function, if you know it.
